spatial_doa: Based on the audio cues, please output the precise azimuth and elevation. Note: Azimuth 0° is straight ahead, positive to the left, range [-180°, 180°]; Elevation 0° is horizontal, positive upwards, range [-90°, 90°].
visual_grounding: Identify the 3D boxes for the {obj_category} in this scene. Follow this format: bbox_i=Bbox(category, x, y, z, dx, dy, dz)
multi_spatial_doa: Where is the {gender} voice coming from? Output azimuth and elevation.
single_source: Determine which speaker corresponds to the audio source.
dual_source: Identify the source speaker for the {gender} voice.
starss23: Where is the {gender} voice coming from? Output azimuth and elevation.
